ops.text: The plan-mode write guard misfires for Plan subagents: a Plan-type subagent assigned its own plan-file path got "This plan file was already written in this planning session. Use the Edit tool" from Write while stat showed the file did not exist — so it could never land its plan on disk (Edit needs an existing file) and had to deliver the whole plan inline over SendMessage. Guard state appears to be session-scoped while the path is per-agent, so the parent's earlier plan-file Write poisons every subagent's first Write to its own path.
